pathlen::validation-ignores-pathlen-in-l.reason: webpki intentionally rejects CA certificates in leaf position (CaUsedAsEndEntity)

pathlen::self-issued-certs-pathlen.reason: webpki does not support self-signed certificates

rfc5280::nc::permitted-dn-match.reason: webpki does not support DirectoryName name constraints

rfc5280::nc::permitted-self-issued.reason: webpki does not support self-signed certificates

rfc5280::ca-as-leaf.reason: webpki intentionally rejects CA certificates in leaf position (CaUsedAsEndEntity)

crl::crlnumber-missing.reason: webpki does not enforce RFC 5280 requirement for CRLNumber extension presence

crl::crlnumber-critical.reason: webpki does not enforce RFC 5280 requirement that CRLNumber be non-critical

crl::issuer-missing-crlsign.reason: webpki does not enforce cRLSign key usage requirement for CRL issuers

rfc5280::aki::critical-aki.reason: webpki does not enforce RFC 5280 requirement that AKI be non-critical

rfc5280::aki::leaf-missing-aki.reason: webpki does not enforce RFC 5280 requirement for AKI presence

rfc5280::aki::intermediate-missing-aki.reason: webpki does not enforce RFC 5280 requirement for AKI presence

rfc5280::aki::cross-signed-root-missing-.reason: webpki does not enforce RFC 5280 requirement for AKI presence

rfc5280::nc::permitted-dns-match-noncrit.reason: webpki does not enforce RFC 5280 requirement that NameConstraints be critical

rfc5280::nc::invalid-dnsname-leading-per.reason: webpki accepts leading period in DNS name constraints

rfc5280::nc::not-allowed-in-ee-noncritic.reason: webpki does not reject NameConstraints extension in EE certificates

rfc5280::nc::not-allowed-in-ee-critical.reason: webpki does not reject NameConstraints extension in EE certificates

rfc5280::pc::ica-noncritical-pc.reason: webpki does not enforce RFC 5280 requirement that PolicyConstraints be critical

rfc5280::san::noncritical-with-empty-sub.reason: webpki does not enforce RFC 5280 requirement that SAN be critical when subject is empty

rfc5280::san::underscore-dns.reason: webpki accepts underscores in DNS names

rfc5280::serial::too-long.reason: webpki does not enforce RFC 5280 serial number length limit

rfc5280::serial::zero.reason: webpki does not enforce RFC 5280 requirement that serial numbers be positive for compatibility reasons

rfc5280::ski::critical-ski.reason: webpki does not enforce RFC 5280 requirement that SKI be non-critical

rfc5280::ski::root-missing-ski.reason: webpki does not enforce RFC 5280 requirement for SKI presence in CA certs

rfc5280::ski::intermediate-missing-ski.reason: webpki does not enforce RFC 5280 requirement for SKI presence in CA certs

rfc5280::validity::expired-root.reason: webpki does not check validity period of trust anchors

rfc5280::ca-empty-subject.reason: webpki does not enforce RFC 5280 requirement that CA subjects be non-empty

rfc5280::unknown-critical-extension-root.reason: webpki does not reject trust anchors with unknown critical extensions

rfc5280::root-missing-basic-constraints.reason: webpki does not enforce BasicConstraints presence in trust anchors

rfc5280::root-non-critical-basic-constra.reason: webpki does not enforce BasicConstraints criticality in trust anchors

rfc5280::root-inconsistent-ca-extensions.reason: webpki does not enforce consistency between BasicConstraints.cA and KeyUsage.keyCertSign in trust anchors

rfc5280::leaf-ku-keycertsign.reason: webpki does not reject EE certs with keyCertSign in KeyUsage

webpki::aki::root-with-aki-missing-keyid.reason: webpki does not enforce CABF requirement for keyIdentifier in root AKI

webpki::aki::root-with-aki-authoritycert.reason: webpki does not enforce CABF prohibition on authorityCertIssuer in root AKI
webpki does not enforce CABF prohibition on authorityCertSerialNumber in root AKI

webpki::aki::root-with-aki-all-fields.reason: webpki does not enforce CABF AKI field requirements for roots

webpki::aki::root-with-aki-ski-mismatch.reason: webpki does not enforce CABF requirement that root AKI match SKI

webpki::eku::ee-anyeku.reason: webpki does not enforce CABF prohibition on anyExtendedKeyUsage in EE certs

webpki::eku::ee-critical-eku.reason: webpki does not enforce CABF requirement that EKU be non-critical

webpki::eku::ee-without-eku.reason: webpki does not enforce CABF requirement for EKU presence in EE certs

webpki::eku::root-has-eku.reason: webpki does not enforce CABF prohibition on EKU in root certs

webpki::nc::intermediate-permitted-exclu.reason: webpki does not enforce CABF NameConstraints encoding requirements
webpki does not enforce CABF NameConstraints encoding requirements

webpki::san::san-critical-with-nonempty-.reason: webpki does not enforce CABF requirement that SAN not be critical when subject is non-empty

webpki::malformed-aia.reason: webpki does not validate AIA extension contents

webpki::forbidden-p192-leaf.reason: webpki does not enforce CABF key algorithm restrictions (P-192 accepted)

webpki::forbidden-dsa-leaf.reason: webpki does not enforce CABF key algorithm restrictions (DSA accepted)

webpki::forbidden-weak-rsa-in-leaf.reason: webpki does not enforce CABF RSA key size minimum (1024-bit accepted)

webpki::forbidden-rsa-not-divisable-by-8.reason: webpki does not enforce CABF requirement that RSA key size be divisible by 8

webpki::forbidden-rsa-key-not-divisable-.reason: webpki does not enforce CABF requirement that RSA key size be divisible by 8
